parameters.command: ={{ '"' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.python_exe + '" "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.pipeline_script + '" --stage detect --case-id "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.case_id + '" --work-dir "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.work_dir + '" --model-path "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.model_path + '" --threshold ' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.threshold + ' --device "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.device + '"' }}

={{ '"' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.python_exe + '" "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.pipeline_script + '" --stage segment --case-id "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.case_id + '" --work-dir "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.work_dir + '"' + ($node["Normalize Input"].json.medsam2_checkpoint ? ' --medsam2-checkpoint "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.medsam2_checkpoint + '"' : '') + ($node["Normalize Input"].json.no_propagate ? ' --no-propagate' : '') }}

={{ '"' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.python_exe + '" "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.pipeline_script + '" --stage report --case-id "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.case_id + '" --work-dir "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.work_dir + '"' + ($node["Normalize Input"].json.use_llm ? ' --use-llm' : '') + ($node["Normalize Input"].json.llm_base_model ? ' --llm-base-model "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.llm_base_model + '"' : '') + ($node["Normalize Input"].json.llm_adapter ? ' --llm-adapter "' + $node["Normalize Input"].json.llm_adapter + '"' : '') + (!$node["Normalize Input"].json.llm_validate_output ? ' --no-llm-validate' : '') }}
